raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The California State Assembly passed Assembly Bill (AB) 2000 to prohibit street racing and sideshows in parking lots across the state.",
    "AB 2000 aims to crack down on dangerous driving that causes injuries and fatalities in California.",
    "Illegal street racing activity has sharply increased during COVID-19 due to reduced traffic on roads.",
    "In 2020, the California Highway Patrol responded to more than 25,000 calls regarding illegal street racing, an increase of over 3,500 from the previous year.",
    "Certain fatalities and injuries in Southern California were caused by street racing incidents.",
    "Law enforcement groups have identified driver's license suspensions as an effective deterrent to illegal street racing activities.",
    "AB 2000 allows courts to issue driver's license suspensions for speed exhibitions during sideshows in parking lots.",
    "The exhibition of speed in parking lots has become increasingly common and has resulted in injuries and fatalities."
  ]
}
```
